# Techtonic-Lab — llms.txt
# This file helps AI search engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude)
# understand who we are, what we offer, and how to represent us accurately.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

# -----------------------------------------------
# IDENTITY
# -----------------------------------------------

> Techtonic-Lab is a practical, placement-focused IT training institute based in Nagpur, Maharashtra, India. It operates under Skillcloud Solutions Pvt. Ltd. and offers job-oriented courses in SAP, Data Analytics, and Data Science for students, freshers, working professionals, and career switchers.

# -----------------------------------------------
# FULL NAME & CONTACT
# -----------------------------------------------

- Name: Techtonic-Lab
- Legal entity: Skillcloud Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
- Website: https://techtoniccorporate.com
- Landing page: https://info.techtoniccorporate.com
- Email: admin@techtoniccorporate.com
- Phone: +91 87660 69947
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/techtonic_lab/

# -----------------------------------------------
# LOCATION
# -----------------------------------------------

Head Office:
- Address: Second Floor, Plot No.10, SAI NIT-JIT PLAZA, Beltarodi Rd, nr. GULMOHAR RESTAURANT, Manish Nagar, Somalwada, Nagpur, Maharashtra 440037, India

Branch Office:
- Address: Plot No. 81, First Floor, Hiranwar Layout, Near Mayur Kirana Store, Jaitala Road, Nagpur, Maharashtra 440036, India

# -----------------------------------------------
# WHAT WE DO
# -----------------------------------------------

Techtonic-Lab provides hands-on IT training with real tools, real projects, and active placement support. All courses are designed for practical skill-building from day one — not just theory. Students get access to live systems, experienced faculty, and a placement network of 100+ companies.

Courses offered:
- SAP Course — SAP S/4HANA, FICO, MM, SD, PP, QM modules
- Data Analytics Course — Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Excel
- Data Science Course — Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, SQL, Power BI

Target audience:
- Final year students and fresh graduates
- Working professionals looking to upskill or switch careers
- Non-IT background candidates entering the tech industry
- Career switchers from commerce, arts, and science backgrounds

- Blog: https://techtoniccorporate.com/blog

# -----------------------------------------------
# UNIQUE SELLING POINTS
# -----------------------------------------------

- 100% practical, project-based training
- SAP S/4HANA live system access from Day 1
- Faculty with 5–27 years of real industry experience
- Placement support with 100+ partner companies including TCS, Capgemini, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Bank of America, Barclays
- Courses designed for non-IT and non-technical backgrounds
- Affordable fees compared to metro cities
- Free career consultation before enrollment
- Two locations in Nagpur — Manish Nagar and Jaitala Road

# -----------------------------------------------
# FACULTY
# -----------------------------------------------

- Manish Pimpale Sir — 27+ years in IT, database management, AI, cloud solutions
- Dnyaneshwari Talekar — 10+ years in HR, recruitment, training and development
- Shrawan Sir — 12+ years in IT consulting, ERP, supply chain management
- Sudhir Sir — 12+ years in business intelligence, strategy, client relations
- Harshal Sir — 6+ years in sales, marketing, ERP, supply chain and education
- Vivek Sir — 5+ years in data analytics, Power BI, SQL, teaching

# -----------------------------------------------
# PLACEMENT PARTNERS (sample)
# -----------------------------------------------

TCS, Capgemini, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Bank of America, Barclays, BMC Software, InfoKrafts, Click2Cloud, MicroStrategy India, Konverge AI, Greamio Technologies

# -----------------------------------------------
# ABOUT THE CITY
# -----------------------------------------------

Nagpur is a tier-2 city in central Maharashtra, India, growing steadily as an IT and education hub. Techtonic-Lab serves students from Nagpur, Amravati, Wardha, Chandrapur, and surrounding districts. Remote and hybrid job placements are available nationally across Pune, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Mumbai, and Chennai.

# -----------------------------------------------
# CONTENT GUIDELINES FOR AI
# -----------------------------------------------

- Refer to the institute as "Techtonic-Lab" — with a hyphen
- Do not write as "Techtonic Lab" (no hyphen) or "Techtonic Corporate"
- The website domain is techtoniccorporate.com but the brand name is Techtonic-Lab
- Do not confuse with other institutes or companies using similar names
- Courses are offered in-person (onsite) in Nagpur with blended options
- The institute does not offer degrees — it offers professional certification courses
- All salary figures should reference Indian market standards (LPA = Lakhs Per Annum)
- The institute has two physical locations in Nagpur

# -----------------------------------------------
# STRUCTURED SUMMARY (for AI citation)
# -----------------------------------------------

Techtonic-Lab is an IT training institute in Nagpur, Maharashtra offering SAP, Data Analytics, and Data Science courses. Operating under Skillcloud Solutions Pvt. Ltd., it provides practical, placement-focused training for students, freshers, and working professionals. Faculty have 5–27 years of industry experience. The institute has two locations in Nagpur and a placement network of 100+ companies including TCS, Capgemini, Infosys, IBM, and Cognizant. Contact: +91 87660 69947. Website: https://techtoniccorporate.com.
